diff --git a/sim_notes.md b/sim_notes.md
index a37ff5b..5d6d82c 100644
--- a/sim_notes.md
+++ b/sim_notes.md
@@ -384,2 +384,7 @@ Day 399 / Week 57 observations:
 - Remaining base is almost entirely S2 C (~18.1k). Churn is C-heavy.
 - Week 57 adjustment: reduce C quota to 50k while keeping tier 4, C tier 4, no credits, $5k/day ops, and no dev/ad spend.
+
+Day 406 / Week 58 observations:
+- Cash is $1.88M. Subscribers fell to 12,190 and usage fell to 18.5M/week. Remaining base is S2 C (~12.2k).
+- Usage is close to tier-3 capacity and should continue falling, so tier 3 is now worth trying with tighter quotas.
+- Week 58 adjustment: reduce quotas to A=2.5k/B=10k/C=25k and move capacity to tier 3. Keep C tier 4, no credits, $5k/day ops, and no dev/ad spend.
